channel.title: GE Vernova — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by GE Vernova (ge_vernova).

item.title: CVE-2026-1763 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Enervista UR Setup DLL Hijacking
item.description: Vulnerability in GE Vernova Enervista UR Setup on Windows.This issue affects Enervista: 8.6 and previous versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-1762 · 2.9 LOW — Enervista UR Setup Directory Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: A vulnerability in GE Vernova Enervista UR Setup on Windows allows File Manipulation.This issue affects Enervista: 8.6 and prior versions.

item.title: CVE-2025-3222 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Smallworld SWMFS Improper Authentication
item.description: Improper Authentication vulnerability in GE Vernova Smallworld on Windows, Linux allows Authentication Abuse.This issue affects Smallworld: 5.3.3 and prior versions for Linux, and 5.3.4. and prior versions for Windows.

item.title: CVE-2025-7719 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Smallworld SWMFS Arbitrary File Ops
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in GE Vernova Smallworld on Windows, Linux allows File Manipulation.This issue affects Smallworld: 5.3.5. and previous versions.

item.title: CVE-2025-9038 · 7.5 HIGH — S1 Agile Privilege Escalation
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in GE Vernova S1 Agile Configuration Software on Windows allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects S1 Agile Configuration Software: 3.1 and previous version.

item.title: CVE-2025-3223 · 5.9 MEDIUM — WorkstationST EGD Configuration Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in GE Vernova WorkstationST on Windows (EGD Configuration Server modules) allows Path Traversal.This issue affects WorkstationST: WorkstationST V07.10.10C an…
